# Paleoecology

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] contributed to the theme of Paleoecology

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] applied paleoecology to understand how foraminifera respond to environmental gradients like salinity and temperature.
